login.subtitle: Access your courses and dashboard.

email.modeHelp: Toggle to create an account with email/password.
email.optionalHelp: Optional. Use email + password for password auth.
email.passwordHelp: Required only if you are using email auth.

phone.codeSent: Code sent. Enter the code you received by SMS.

verify.subtitle: Complete verification to continue.
verify.emailHint: We sent a confirmation email to {email}. Open it and confirm your account.
verify.phoneHint: Enter the verification code sent to {phone}.

notice.signupSuccess: Account created. Check your email to confirm your signup (if email confirmation is enabled).

login.tos: By signing in, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

errors.enterEmailOrPhone: Enter at least an email or a phone number.
errors.emailRequiredForPasswordAuth: Email is required for password authentication.
errors.passwordRequiredForEmail: Password is required when email is used.
errors.phoneRequiredForOtp: Phone number is required to send OTP.
errors.phoneAlreadyRegistered: This phone number is already registered.
errors.phoneNotFoundForOtp: This phone number is not registered.
